name: First Republic Bank
description: First Republic Bank was a commercial bank and provider of wealth management services headquartered in San Francisco, California. It catered to high-net-worth individuals and operated offices in several states, including California, New York, Massachusetts, and Florida. The bank offered personal banking, business banking, trust, and wealth management services, emphasizing a high-touch, relationship-based service model. In May 2023, the bank was closed by regulators and its assets were sold to JPMorgan Chase.
